priority_rows.title: Task Decomposition Primitive + Parallel Micro-Task Execution
priority_rows.problem: Turns large goals into executable micro-work, enabling fast autonomous and crowd-assisted progress at scale.
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/execution/task_decomposition_primitive.ts` + policy `config/task_decomposition_primitive_policy.json`; emits standardized micro-task profiles with Weaver/Storm parallel routing, Heroic Echo + constitution gates, duality indicators, and per-task attribution/passport linkage; validated by `memory/tools/tests/task_decomposition_primitive.test.js`.

priority_rows.title: Self-Healing Migration Daemon
priority_rows.problem: Installations still pointing to legacy remotes/workspaces will drift unless migration is auto-detected and prompted.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add startup migration detector/daemon that identifies legacy remotes, offers one-click guided upgrade, records consent + signed receipts, and integrates with `V4-SELF-001` findings for migration suggestions without forced mutation.

priority_rows.title: Capacity + Unit Economics Governance (p95/p99 + Cost per User)
priority_rows.problem: Scale can fail economically even when technically stable if cost/perf budgets are not enforced continuously.
priority_rows.acceptance: Define capacity planning model and per-user cost guardrails, enforce latency/cost budgets in release gates, and emit periodic cost-efficiency receipts proving sustainable growth through each scale stage. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V4-SCALE-010 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V4-SCALE-010; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: `protheus-redlegion` Adversarial Operations CLI
priority_rows.problem: Adversarial/red-team capabilities are fragmented across defense lanes without a unified operator CLI for controlled mission lifecycle management.
priority_rows.acceptance: Deliver `protheus-redlegion` CLI for mission launch/observe/terminate with strict covenant gating, blast-radius limits, and cinematic evidence receipts. Verify via red-team simulation suites and mission rollback drills; rollback by feature-gating standalone interface and preserving existing defense lane triggers.

priority_rows.title: `protheus-econ` Unit-Economics CLI
priority_rows.problem: Economic governance logic exists but lacks a standalone product-facing CLI for budgeting, efficiency scoring, and economics receipts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Deliver `protheus-econ` CLI for budget/efficiency forecasting and unit-economics scoring with policy guards and signed outputs consumable by release gates. Verify via economics simulation tests and threshold contract checks; rollback by routing economy evaluation through current ops lanes only.

priority_rows.title: Cap-Aware Deferred Queue Scheduler
priority_rows.problem: Daily/canary cap holds are being counted as policy holds instead of being deferred cleanly, inflating hold rate and wasting attempt slots.
priority_rows.acceptance: Introduce cap-aware scheduling that defers excess runnable work to a parked queue without consuming attempts, with deterministic rehydration when caps reopen and queue-aging SLO receipts. Verify with queue-drain simulation receipts; success criteria: reduce cap-related holds by >=60% and stale-pending backlog by >=30% over 30 days. Rollback by restoring baseline scheduler cap-handling policy.

priority_rows.title: Runbook + SLO wiring for conduit and source-of-truth drift
priority_rows.problem: On-call lacked explicit playbooks for conduit/SoT operational failures
priority_rows.acceptance: Runbooks include incidents for cron delivery misconfiguration and Rust source-of-truth drift; SLO map includes `cron_delivery_integrity` and `rust_source_of_truth` checks with deterministic ownership mapping.

priority_rows.title: On-Call + Incident Command Maturity Pack
priority_rows.problem: Incident handling exists but lacks one codified IC model with measurable response-performance gates.
priority_rows.acceptance: Define incident severity matrix, rotation/ownership map, paging policy, MTTA/MTTR SLOs, and mandatory postmortem template with tracked corrective actions; run monthly game-day, publish receipts, and verify rollback drills for top-severity failure classes.

priority_rows.title: Operator runbook for incidents + rollback drills
priority_rows.problem: Reduce time-to-recover and remove tribal-knowledge dependency during failures
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with top incident classes (routing degraded, schema drift, sensory starvation, autonomy stall), deterministic remediation, rollback drill, and verification artifacts Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_034_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Baseline objective value-currency propagation
priority_rows.problem: Keep autonomy aligned to objective-specific success definitions during unattended runs
priority_rows.acceptance: Propagate directive-derived value currency into admission + queue ranking baseline paths, with deterministic audit fields and no regression to drift/safety SLOs Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v1h_007_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Dist runtime cutover + legacy paired JS retirement
priority_rows.problem: Remove long-term TS/JS dual-maintenance cost without breaking runtime contracts
priority_rows.acceptance: Dist runtime mode + cutover controller landed (`lib/ts_bootstrap.js`, `systems/ops/dist_runtime_cutover.ts`, `docs/DIST_RUNTIME_CUTOVER.md`), `verify` now enforces `legacy_runtime_js_pairs` via `legacy-pairs`, final non-wrapper twin retired (`systems/fractal/regime_organ.js` wrapper-only), and regression test coverage is green

priority_rows.title: Autonomous skill generation pipeline (guarded)
priority_rows.problem: Enable Protheus to generate new reusable skills from repeated successful patterns, not just install existing ones
priority_rows.acceptance: Guarded pattern->candidate->sandbox->ROI gate->publish pipeline is implemented in `systems/autonomy/skill_generation_pipeline.ts` with policy + tests and novelty-only blocking

priority_rows.title: Hybrid Memory Engine (Vector + Graph + Temporal)
priority_rows.problem: Current memory capabilities are strong but split across lanes without one unified retrieval primitive contract.
priority_rows.acceptance: Unified retrieval primitive supports vector similarity + graph traversal + temporal constraints with benchmarked improvements and no regression to provenance/explainability receipts. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-009:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-009; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/memory/hybrid_memory_engine.ts`.

priority_rows.title: In-Process Rust Memory Binding Lane (`napi-rs`)
priority_rows.problem: Daemon/CLI transport is robust but still adds avoidable overhead on hottest memory call sites.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added optional in-process `napi` adapter lane (`systems/memory/rust_napi_binding.ts`) and integrated it into unified transport orchestration (`memory_transport` + `memory_recall`) so query/get attempt N-API first when available, with deterministic daemon/CLI fallback and parity regression tests (including fake-module N-API fixtures).

priority_rows.title: Insider-Threat Split-Trust Command Governance
priority_rows.problem: High-trust operator pathways remain a residual risk without thresholded approvals and out-of-band confirmation for irreversible actions.
priority_rows.acceptance: Enforce split-trust approvals for designated commands, independent confirmation channel, and denial-by-default on missing quorum receipts. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-055 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-055; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Hypothesis Lifecycle Ledger
priority_rows.problem: Detector learning is weak without explicit end-to-end hypothesis outcome memory.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `systems/sensory/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger.{ts,js}` + `config/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger_policy.json` to persist hypothesis state transitions (`proposed/tested/accepted/rejected`) with challenger/outcome linkage into a durable ledger and lifecycle state artifacts under `state/sensory/analysis/hypothesis_lifecycle/`; regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger.test.js`.

priority_rows.title: V3-MINE Donor Reward Ledger + Mining-Share Issuance
priority_rows.problem: Compute-tithe discounts exist, but explicit donor share issuance and reward accounting needed for transparent, contribution-proportional payouts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Extend `systems/economy/` with V3-MINE ledger lane that converts verified useful compute into bounded share issuance, tracks accrual by donor identity, emits deterministic contribution->share receipts with anti-duplication guards, and includes rollback/replay recovery contracts for mis-awards.

priority_rows.title: NVIDIA AI Enterprise Certification Readiness Lane
priority_rows.problem: Mutual dependency with V3-RACE-279 deadlocked enterprise certification sequence.
priority_rows.acceptance: Dependency graph repaired to acyclic form; downstream queue execution must verify gate behavior and preserve explicit rollback/fallback controls during promotion. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-288 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-288; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: ExecuTorch/TorchAO Edge Execution Lane (PyTorch-First)
priority_rows.problem: Meta mobile/edge execution goals require first-class PyTorch edge tooling integration under existing governance contracts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add ExecuTorch/TorchAO execution adapters with compatibility bridges for existing inference paths, require verification receipts for latency/quality parity, and include rollback-safe framework fallback controls on regression. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-294 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-294; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Alien Technology Aesthetic Layer (`alien_aesthetic=1`)
priority_rows.problem: Cross-surface tone and wording are still inconsistent, reducing the intended high-discipline system feel across CLI/UI/receipts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add a feature-flagged aesthetic/tone pack (`alien_aesthetic=1`) covering CLI (`protheusctl status/settle/audit/migrate`), Reasoning Mirror, `protheus-top`, settle logs, receipts, self-audit reports, and onboarding completion text with calm clinical language and no gimmick style. Reuse `V4-SETTLE-011` substrate fallback behavior and exact line contract, enforce professional-tone guardrails (no hype/humor/exclamation), and verify with snapshot/tone-contract tests plus zero measurable performance regression. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V4-AESTHETIC-001 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V4-AESTHETIC-001; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Protheus Labs Org Identity Sweep
priority_rows.problem: Branding and author voice are inconsistent across repository surfaces (README, CLI help, contracts, package metadata), which weakens credibility and onboarding clarity.
priority_rows.acceptance: Perform a full-surface identity sweep to standardize org naming (`Protheus Labs`), team voice, and legal metadata across docs/CLI/contracts/packages with snapshot tests for key user-facing surfaces. Verify via docs/CLI snapshot receipts and link-integrity checks; rollback by restoring prior branding profile from versioned baselines.

priority_rows.title: History Cleanliness Program (Changelog + Release Discipline + Commit Hygiene)
priority_rows.problem: Repo history and release narration can drift without one explicit cleanliness policy and changelog contract.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add canonical changelog policy and release-note workflow, define non-rewrite default history discipline, and enforce merge hygiene checklist for artifact-heavy changes; surface in contributing docs and PR templates.

priority_rows.title: HypothesisForge background trend + hypothesis engine
priority_rows.problem: Trend/hypothesis generation is not yet continuously operational as a background scientific lane.
priority_rows.acceptance: Promote adversarial challenger + cross-temporal delta capabilities into a continuous hypothesis service that ranks candidates by prior, VOI, and disconfirming experiment value; verify ranking quality and consent gates with regression tests + audit receipts; rollback via service disable flag and queue-lane fallback. Evidence: `systems/science/hypothesis_forge.ts`.

priority_rows.title: 1M-User Performance Certification Harness
priority_rows.problem: Scale-readiness lanes exist, but no single certification harness proves sustained 1M-user target behavior with promotion gates.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add repeatable large-scale load harness with traffic profiles, p95/p99 latency budgets by operation class, saturation thresholds, and cost-per-request metrics; promotion blocked unless certification receipts pass for current release candidate; enforce rollback to prior release profile on failed certification.

priority_rows.title: Model variant profiles (`:thinking` and base)
priority_rows.problem: Use reasoning variants only when justified to control cost/latency
priority_rows.acceptance: Routing policy defines when to use thinking variants, with auto-return to anchor model and measurable quality gain Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_010_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Weekly strategy synthesis from executed outcomes
priority_rows.problem: Ensure strategy layer learns from realized outcomes instead of raw proposal volume
priority_rows.acceptance: Scheduled synthesis summarizes executed proposals, winners/losers, and recommended strategy weight updates with deterministic trace to receipts Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_029_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Network egress choke point for autonomous actions
priority_rows.problem: Reduce exfiltration/abuse blast radius by forcing all outbound actions through a policy gate
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `lib/egress_gateway.js` + `systems/security/egress_gateway.js` with `config/egress_gateway_policy.json`; sensory collectors/focus and Moltbook API/guard route outbound HTTP through gateway with allowlists, rate caps, and decision audits in `state/security/egress_audit.jsonl`

priority_rows.title: Quorum validator for high-tier self-modification proposals
priority_rows.problem: Add independent cross-check before risky self-edits are applied
priority_rows.acceptance: High-tier mutation proposals require deterministic second-pass validator agreement before admission; disagreement blocks with explainable receipt Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_033_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Exception novelty classifier + recovery policy
priority_rows.problem: Prevent retry spirals and route genuinely new failures to human review quickly
priority_rows.acceptance: Classifier stores signature memory and now applies deterministic recovery decisions from `config/autonomy_exception_recovery_policy.json`; autonomy exception telemetry includes action/cooldown/playbook fields, and novel signatures route to escalation policy

priority_rows.title: Persona continuity + arbitration + structured outputs hardening
priority_rows.problem: Reduce manual synthesis load by making persona memory recall, disagreement resolution, and output aggregation deterministic
priority_rows.acceptance: `protheus lens` now injects last-5 correspondence continuity, ships dedicated `protheus arbitrate --between=... --issue=...`, supports structured `--schema=json` outputs, optional anti-puppet `--surprise=on`, stance cache routing (`personas/organization/stance_cache.json`), and session meta-feedback commands (`lens feedback`, `feedback-summary`) with regression + sovereignty checks Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_044_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Prompt cache policy split by lane (reflex/autonomy/dream)
priority_rows.acceptance: Router prompt-cache policy now supports per-lane overrides (`reflex`/`autonomy`/`dream`) with lane-keyed cache signatures and telemetry (`systems/routing/model_router.ts`, `config/agent_routing_rules.json`); regression coverage validates lane override behavior (`memory/tools/tests/model_router_routing_features.test.js`).

priority_rows.title: Dream fallback quality scoring before proposal injection
priority_rows.acceptance: Proposal enrichment now computes dream-signal quality (`quality_score`, `quality_tier`, `quality_scale`) before applying dream bonuses, and low-quality signals are automatically scaled down with explicit reason codes (`systems/autonomy/proposal_enricher.ts`); coverage updated in `memory/tools/tests/proposal_enricher.test.js`.

priority_rows.acceptance: Add precedence + conflict lint and block conflicting gate combinations in CI; linked: `V2-FND-004`, `V3-044`

priority_rows.title: Duplicate execution pathways
priority_rows.problem: Parallel lanes drift and produce inconsistent behavior under load
priority_rows.acceptance: Define one canonical execution path per capability and deprecate alternates with expiry receipts; linked: `V3-039`, `V3-040`

priority_rows.title: Read-only recursive introspection baseline
priority_rows.problem: Operator/system visibility into branch pressure and state is required before aggressive restructuring
priority_rows.acceptance: Emit machine-readable branch health snapshot (workers, leases, queues, cooldowns, policy holds) and wire it into health/ops reporting without any auto-restructure actions yet Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v1h_008_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Chaos testing program (adaptive + orchestration lanes)
priority_rows.problem: Stress resilience under controlled failures once V1 hardening is stable
priority_rows.acceptance: Scenario-driven chaos receipts + strict recovery checks shipped in `systems/ops/chaos_program.ts` with policy + tests

priority_rows.title: System black-box hash ledger (EU compliance fallback)
priority_rows.problem: Anticipate EU compliance/audit pressure with tamper-evident decision traceability while minimizing sensitive payload retention
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/security/black_box_ledger.ts` now generates append-only chain + per-rollup hashed detail ledgers with verify/status commands (legacy-compatible), and spine rolls up daily (`spine_black_box_ledger`)

priority_rows.title: Resonance/harmony score controller
priority_rows.problem: Detect high-consensus subsystem alignment and exploit it safely
priority_rows.acceptance: Harmony scoring remains bounded [0,1] and is now contract-verified in cycle outputs/status (`verification_pass`) with explicit failure IDs for debugging and safe rollback guidance. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v2_035_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Collective Shadow ranking lane
priority_rows.problem: Convert non-yield + red-team outcomes into bounded avoid/reinforce archetypes that influence ranking without direct actuation
priority_rows.acceptance: Collective Shadow now emits policy-bound verification (`verification_pass`) and a formal rollback profile (`disable_lane_and_revert_latest_pointer`) in run/status outputs while preserving capped ranking influence via `candidateCollectiveShadowSignal`. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v2_038_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Independent Safety Coprocessor & Out-of-Band Veto Plane
priority_rows.problem: Single-plane governance can fail catastrophically under correlated faults or supply-chain compromise.
priority_rows.acceptance: Ship isolated guardian plane with independent policy root, kill/revert authority, and verified communication channel to main runtime with non-bypass tests.

priority_rows.title: Execution Floor Contract (Sunday Included, Explicit Observation Override)
priority_rows.problem: Defaulting to observation-only days can normalize non-execution drift during critical objective windows.
priority_rows.acceptance: Execution-floor contract enforces min shipped/day and schedules catch-up reservation receipts when floor is missed without override. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-075:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-075; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Adaptive Escalation TTL + Salvage Queue
priority_rows.problem: Fixed escalation TTL can drop still-valuable escalations and reduce recovery effectiveness.
priority_rows.acceptance: Escalation TTL now adapts by score; expired high-score escalations are salvaged (snooze/park + salvage ledger) while low-score rows are rejected. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-077:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-077; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Command Registry + Script Surface Rationalization
priority_rows.problem: Very large script surfaces increase discoverability drift, ownership ambiguity, and accidental contract break risk.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add canonical command registry manifest with owner/scope/risk metadata, reduce direct root scripts to curated operator surface, preserve compatibility aliases via generated wrappers, and add CI guard that blocks unregistered scripts. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_github_sync.js`.

priority_rows.title: Always-On Idle RSI Scheduler (Background Hands + Freshness Loop)
priority_rows.problem: Intake requires 24/7 bounded RSI operation, but this must remain budget-safe and freshness-governed.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add scheduler profile tying background hands execution to world-model freshness checks, quiet hours, and resource budgets; emit SLO receipts and bounded retry behavior.

priority_rows.title: Probationary Security Habit Apply + Promotion Loop
priority_rows.problem: Discovery broadcast alone is insufficient; nodes need deterministic probationary apply behavior with validation before promotion to active defense posture.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add node-side probationary apply contract that stages incoming security updates as habits, runs doctor/System3 validation, auto-promotes on pass, auto-reverts on failure, and records reason-coded receipts for every transition. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-196:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-196; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_queue_executor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Preview-Horizon Success Criteria Contract (Deferred Metrics in Score-Only)
priority_rows.problem: Score-only receipts currently fail when criteria are valid but time-windowed (e.g., postconditions/outreach replies), distorting pass-rate telemetry and readiness.
priority_rows.acceptance: Update success-criteria verifier + receipt taxonomy so deferred-horizon checks are explicitly marked `deferred_pending_window` in score-only, counted separately from hard fails, with verification receipts and rollback-safe config toggle to restore strict legacy behavior if regressions appear. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-204:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-204; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Score-Only Manual-Gate Exclusion & Selector Penalty
priority_rows.problem: Re-selecting manual/high-risk proposals in score-only produces predictable `preview_executable=false` outcomes and wastes attempts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Implement selector gate that deprioritizes/blocks manual-gated candidates during score-only unless no safe alternative passes; emit decision receipts with reason codes and include rollback switch to restore prior selection ordering for comparison. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-206:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-206; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Model Health Stabilizer (Adaptive Probe Timeouts + Temporary Suppression/Rehab)
priority_rows.problem: Repeated probe timeouts on key models degrade routing diversity and increase fallback pressure, hurting throughput reliability.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add adaptive probe timeout policy plus temporary suppression/rehabilitation for unstable models, prove improved healthy-model availability with verification receipts, and include rollback policy to revert timeout/suppression tuning if latency or quality regresses. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-208:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-208; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: CloudWatch/X-Ray Observability Bridge + Tauri Dashboard Embed
priority_rows.problem: AWS operations need provider-native telemetry/trace adapters while preserving existing observability contract semantics.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add CloudWatch/X-Ray adapters and dashboard embed profile for `protheus-top`, require verification receipts for OTel signal parity and trace continuity, and include rollback-safe fallback to existing observability backends. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-243 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-243; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Isaac Sim/ROS Embodied Validation Lane (Sim2Real Guard)
priority_rows.problem: Robotics-grounded validation improves confidence for physically-coupled workflows and embodied lane behavior.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add Isaac Sim/ROS validation adapters with Sim2Real test contracts, require verification receipts for embodied scenario coverage and regression outcomes, and include rollback-safe embodied-lane disable path on validation failures. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-284 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-284; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Certified Enterprise Hardware Compatibility + Tuning Matrix Lane
priority_rows.problem: Mission-critical enterprise rollout requires certified hardware support and deterministic performance/safety tuning profiles.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add vendor-certified compatibility matrix and tuning contracts for target server classes, require verification receipts for certification/tuning outcomes, and include rollback-safe profile fallback to generic hardware settings on mismatch. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-338 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-338; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Harness Apply Path for Self-Improving Red-Team
priority_rows.problem: `red_team_harness` currently hardcodes `apply: false` when calling self-improvement, preventing governed live promotion through the main harness path.
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/red_team_harness.ts` now propagates CLI/policy apply intent (`--self-improve-apply`) into `systems/redteam/self_improving_redteam_trainer.ts`; downstream policy gates (`shadow_only` + `allow_apply`) remain authoritative. Coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/red_team_harness.test.js` for shadow-blocked vs apply-eligible runs.

priority_rows.title: Bounded Resource-Sink Decoy Paths
priority_rows.problem: Prolonged unauthorized probing should consume disproportionate attacker resources without unsafe behavior
priority_rows.acceptance: Added bounded resource-sink semantics via stack-pressure + decoy profiles (`max_resource_sink_factor`, finite constraints, non-destructive flags) in adaptive defense policy/runner. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_003_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Legacy dependency anchor (V3-SK-001)
priority_rows.problem: This prerequisite ID is referenced by active backlog rows but was not present in canonical registry rows after parsing.
priority_rows.acceptance: Canonical anchor added so dependency checks can verify this prerequisite as satisfied; no new execution lane is required and rollback remains the original upstream lane fallback. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_sk_001_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Defensive Decoy Response Layer (Non-Destructive)
priority_rows.problem: Unauthorized sessions receive specially crafted low-value outputs designed to provide no useful IP or training value
priority_rows.acceptance: Added deterministic non-destructive decoys (`generateDecoyResponse`) with watermark lineage, bounded quality tiers, and bounded distillation-resistance overlays (decoy distillation guard); ingress now enforces decoy-only output mode from configured stage (enforcement decoy from stage) in non-shadow runtime (`systems/security/request_ingress.ts`).

priority_rows.title: LensMap Adoption Bridge (Import + Sync + Toolchain Fit)
priority_rows.problem: Teams need a deterministic migration path from existing comment-heavy repositories into LensMap to avoid manual conversion cost and drift.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add adoption bridge commands for import/sync/mapping (`import`, `sync`, compatibility adapters) with OpenClaw/legacy comment migration support, diff receipts, and reversible checkpoints. Verify via migration simulation suites and round-trip parity tests between source comments and generated lenses. Rollback by forcing read-only compatibility mode and disabling write-path migration adapters.

priority_rows.title: `protheus-forge` Productization Uplift
priority_rows.problem: Forge capabilities exist but are not packaged as a consistent standalone productized CLI with contract and policy parity to the rest of the suite.
priority_rows.acceptance: Enhance forge lane into `protheus-forge` CLI with stable command surface, receipt output schema, and package-quality docs/tests/contracts aligned to suite standards. Verify via command-registry contract tests and forge workflow regression checks; rollback by retaining existing forge entrypoints as canonical fallback.

priority_rows.title: `protheus-bootstrap` Scaffolding CLI
priority_rows.problem: New-project bootstrapping is not yet exposed as a polished standalone command path, increasing setup friction and inconsistency across projects.
priority_rows.acceptance: Deliver `protheus-bootstrap` CLI that generates policy-compliant project skeletons (contracts/tests/CI/hooks) with configurable templates and receipt-logged initialization. Verify via golden-template tests and bootstrap reproducibility checks; rollback by disabling standalone bootstrap and reverting to existing onboarding scaffolds.

priority_rows.title: Budget Burst Smoothing + Autopause Prevention
priority_rows.problem: Autopause-triggered budget holds still appear in the window when burn bursts exceed pacing controls, increasing hold churn and forcing hard stops.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add token-burst smoothing and budget preflight pacing in the route path, with proactive deferral when projected burn crosses guard bands; emit budget-pressure receipts and enforce rollback-safe bypass policy for emergency-only mode. Success criteria: keep budget-hold rate below 0.05 for 30 consecutive days.

priority_rows.title: API/CLI Contract Lifecycle (Versioning + Deprecation)
priority_rows.problem: Public/internal interfaces evolve quickly without a single contract lifecycle policy that guarantees backward compatibility windows.
priority_rows.acceptance: Implement semantic versioning policy for API/CLI contracts, required deprecation windows, compatibility regression tests for prior minor versions, and changelog gate enforcing migration notes for breaking changes; include rollback compatibility profile for last stable contract set.

priority_rows.title: Unified global budget governor across reflex/autonomy/focus/dream/spawn
priority_rows.problem: Prevent resource contention and runaway loops under concurrent adaptive workloads
priority_rows.acceptance: Spawn token budgeting now shares global `system_budget` state/events path by default, autonomy reads same global state dir, focus controller enforces per-run budget gating + writes allow/degrade/deny decisions, and all contention decisions are auditable in centralized budget events Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_023_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Secret broker isolation + scoped credential handles
priority_rows.problem: Prevent high-capability models from directly reading raw secrets from disk during autonomous changes
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `lib/secret_broker.js` + `systems/security/secret_broker.js`; autonomous Moltbook flows issue/resolve time-scoped handles; credential reads centralized in broker and audited to `state/security/secret_broker_audit.jsonl`

priority_rows.title: Global cost governor + autopause guardrails
priority_rows.problem: Enforce hard resource boundaries across autonomy/reflex/focus/dream paths
priority_rows.acceptance: Unified daily/monthly budget policies apply to all adaptive executors, burn-rate spike and low-credit thresholds trigger automatic pause/degrade actions, and every block/allow decision is audit-logged with reason Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_038_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Child lane: Autonomy remediation-depth mapper Rust migration (`proposalRemediationDepth`)
priority_rows.problem: `proposalRemediationDepth` now routes through Rust autoscale primitive (`proposal_remediation_depth`) with bridge path, TS fallback parity, and lane-scoped parity tests.
priority_rows.acceptance: Completed with Rust primitive + bridge + parity test (`autonomy_proposal_remediation_depth_rust_parity.test.js`).

priority_rows.title: Child lane: Autonomy proposal dedupe-key builder Rust migration (`proposalDedupKey`)
priority_rows.problem: `proposalDedupKey` now routes through Rust autoscale primitive (`proposal_dedup_key`) with bridge path, TS fallback parity, and lane-scoped parity tests.
priority_rows.acceptance: Completed with Rust primitive + bridge + parity test (`autonomy_proposal_dedup_key_rust_parity.test.js`).

priority_rows.title: Capability ceiling + containment envelopes
priority_rows.problem: Bound high-capability model action scope even if cognition increases sharply
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented `systems/security/capability_envelope_guard.ts` and wired envelope denials into Eye route decisions (`systems/eye/eye_kernel.ts`) with regression coverage (`memory/tools/tests/capability_envelope_guard.test.js`)

priority_rows.title: In-flight workflow mutation engine (runtime step-level adaptation)
priority_rows.problem: Achieve true live adaptation during execution rather than run-to-run mutation only
priority_rows.acceptance: Workflow executor run/status surfaces now include runtime mutation verification and explicit rollback contracts in stdout payloads + persisted run snapshots, with gating regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/workflow_executor_mutation_gate.test.js`. Evidence: `systems/workflow/workflow_executor.js`.

priority_rows.title: Central Eye kernel (`systems/eye`) with governed subsumption adapters
priority_rows.problem: Build the top-level orchestrator for multi-model/multi-system coordination without bypassing safety gates
priority_rows.acceptance: Eye kernel command bus is live with budget/clearance gates and deterministic receipts; capability envelope guard now provides additional strict containment (`systems/eye/eye_kernel.ts`, `memory/tools/tests/eye_kernel.test.js`)

priority_rows.title: Deterministic Time Harness for Release/TTL Gates
priority_rows.problem: Calendar-dependent tests create false regressions and hide real failures.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added injected-now harness wiring for TTL/age-sensitive release gates and queue lifecycle paths, with deterministic regression fixtures in `memory/tools/tests/queue_gc.test.js`, `memory/tools/tests/ci_baseline_guard.test.js`, and `memory/tools/tests/post_launch_migration_readiness.test.js`. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-061:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-061; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Top-K Execution Reservation Lane
priority_rows.problem: High-worth proposals can starve while queue churn/aging consumes execution bandwidth.
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented top-K reservation under apply mode (`proposal_accepted` + queue decision accept events) from highest-worth open proposals. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-070:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-070; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`.

priority_rows.title: Dependency Boundary Enforcement (Layer Import Contracts)
priority_rows.problem: Folder-level architecture only helps if dependency directions are machine-enforced.
priority_rows.acceptance: Introduce dependency boundary manifest (allowed layer imports + forbidden edges), run contract check in CI/merge guard, and fail on cycles or boundary violations in protected paths. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_race_117_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Enterprise Observability Surface (Azure Monitor + Desktop `protheus-top`)
priority_rows.problem: Existing telemetry contracts need enterprise adapter and operator UX parity for hybrid local/cloud operations.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add Azure Monitor exporter/bridge for existing OTel signals and ship desktop observability dashboard profile in Tauri operator surface, with regression tests for signal parity and rollback-safe fallback to current observability backends. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-227:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-227; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_queue_executor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: AWS Accelerator HAL Adapter (Neuron/Trainium/Inferentia + Nitro Metadata Placement)
priority_rows.problem: AWS hardware classes need explicit HAL contracts so placement decisions remain typed, auditable, and fail closed.
priority_rows.acceptance: Extend HAL with AWS accelerator and Nitro metadata adapters, require verification receipts for placement decisions and capability mismatches, and include rollback-safe fallback to CPU/default placement on adapter regression. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-233 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-233; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: AWS Reproducible Artifact Profile (AMI/ECR/Serverless via Nix + Image Builder)
priority_rows.problem: Enterprise AWS rollout credibility depends on deterministic artifact reproducibility across AMI/container/serverless targets.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add AWS artifact pipeline profile using Nix + EC2 Image Builder/Bottlerocket surfaces, require verification receipts for reproducibility/provenance parity, and include rollback-safe artifact channel revoke/restore contracts. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_queue_executor.ts`, `systems/ops/aws_reproducible_artifact_profile.ts`.

priority_rows.title: ChromeOS/Fuchsia Distribution & OTA Adapter
priority_rows.problem: Google deployment channels need explicit packaging/update contracts for ChromeOS/Fuchsia alongside existing distribution lanes.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add ChromeOS/Fuchsia distribution adapters with OTA update contracts, require verification receipts for package integrity and update rollback behavior, and include rollback-safe channel freeze/revert controls.

priority_rows.title: Video-First Memory World-Model Extension (Zero-Copy GPU/NPU Replay)
priority_rows.problem: Tesla-style world-model workflows require memory primitives optimized for high-rate video streams and replay fidelity.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add video-first memory extension with compression/replay and zero-copy transfer contracts, require verification receipts for replay fidelity/performance/privacy constraints, and include rollback-safe fallback to baseline memory pipeline on degradation. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-321 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-321; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Optimus Embodied Symbiosis Primitive Pack (Dexterity Memory + Multi-Robot Coordination)
priority_rows.problem: Persistent embodied collaboration needs dedicated memory/coordination primitives for dexterity and multi-robot workflows.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add embodied symbiosis primitives for dexterous memory and multi-robot coordination, require verification receipts for coordination safety/performance, and include rollback-safe disable path for unstable embodied lanes. Verify via node systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js run --id=V3-RACE-326 --apply=1 --strict=1 and node memory/tools/tests/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.test.js --id=V3-RACE-326; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected.

priority_rows.title: Public Collaboration Surface Pack (Issue/PR Templates + Triage Contracts)
priority_rows.problem: Public collaboration artifacts are partially present but not complete enough for enterprise external contributor expectations.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add issue template suite (bug/feature/security), triage labels/process docs, response-time expectations, and governance links; verify templates are active and linked from contributing docs. Evidence: `systems/ops/public_collaboration_surface_pack.ts`.

priority_rows.title: LensMap Standalone Internal Tool Repository
priority_rows.problem: Lens capabilities are currently coupled to the main repository, limiting org-level tool separation and reducing the appearance of a mature multi-repo internal platform.
priority_rows.acceptance: Package LensMap as standalone repo-grade artifact set (`lensmap` CLI + docs/policies/examples), with internal-tool framing assets (`README`, `CHANGELOG`, CI placeholder, contributing guide) and compatibility contracts for private/public lens modes. Verify via CLI contract tests (`init/add/show/validate/insert/expose`) plus docs-surface checks and signed receipt outputs for lens operations. Rollback by disabling standalone wrapper integration and preserving in-repo lens path as canonical fallback.

priority_rows.title: Compliance Evidence Automation (SOC2/ISO Audit Bundle)
priority_rows.problem: Compliance controls are present in parts but audit evidence packaging is not yet deterministic and repeatable for external review.
priority_rows.acceptance: Build control-evidence collector that maps controls to artifacts/receipts automatically, generates quarterly audit bundle export, enforces evidence freshness windows, and fails compliance check when controls lack current evidence; include control-failure rollback playbooks in bundle output.

priority_rows.title: Golden-Path Onboarding + Developer Portal
priority_rows.problem: Onboarding quality is improving but still spread across files, reducing first-week productivity and enterprise onboarding confidence.
priority_rows.acceptance: Ship one-command bootstrap + role-based onboarding tracks (`operator`, `backend`, `infra`, `security`) with task checklists and success telemetry; target `new contributor to first verified change <= 30 minutes` in test environment and include rollback guidance for failed setup paths.

priority_rows.title: Workflow Trigger Commands + Persona Dashboard
priority_rows.problem: Persona consults required manual command memory, which reduced day-to-day adoption and made state visibility fragmented.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `protheus lens trigger <pre-sprint|drift-alert|weekly-checkin>` and `protheus lens dashboard [--window=<n>]` in `systems/personas/cli.ts` with trigger telemetry (`metric=trigger_activation`) and markdown dashboard summaries tied to `personas/organization/triggers.md`. Verified by `node memory/tools/tests/personas_lens_cli.test.js` (trigger + dashboard assertions). Rollback by removing trigger/dashboard branches and trigger telemetry rows.

priority_rows.title: Memory Consolidation + Forgetting Curves
priority_rows.problem: Raw retention growth will raise token/storage burn and degrade retrieval precision over time.
priority_rows.acceptance: Scheduled reflection jobs merge/prune memory using explicit forgetting curves + retention policies, with recall-quality and burn-efficiency benchmarks proving net gain.
