priority_rows.problem: Release and vulnerability checks were present in parts but lacked a single deterministic baseline for draft release and dependency audits.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `.github/workflows/release.yml` (draft release automation) and `.github/workflows/security-audit.yml` (`npm audit` + `cargo audit`) while preserving SBOM release workflow.

priority_rows.title: Observability + SLO + runbook completion pass
priority_rows.problem: Metrics/runbooks exist but unattended mode needs complete coverage with actionable alerts
priority_rows.acceptance: Added explicit `verification_pass_rate` health SLO gate in `health_status`, enforced SLO->runbook coverage via `config/autonomy_slo_runbook_map.json` + `slo_runbook_check`, and added `Incident 8: Verification Pass-Rate Regression` procedures in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with regression tests

priority_rows.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation + Data Governance Contract
priority_rows.problem: Tenant-boundary and data-governance assurances are not yet unified into one fail-closed certification path.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add tenant-isolation invariants, data-classification enforcement, delete/export contract tests, and cross-tenant access adversarial suite; fail closed with human alert on isolation violations and documented rollback path to safe isolation baseline.

priority_rows.title: Habit promotion quality hardening
priority_rows.problem: Prevent no-op scaffolds from promoting without real value
priority_rows.acceptance: Promotion checks include measured savings/effect threshold Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_005_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Automated stale-state cleanup helper
priority_rows.problem: Reduce local churn from old generated artifacts
priority_rows.acceptance: Non-destructive cleanup command with dry-run and allowlist Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_006_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Repo hygiene CI check for generated artifacts
priority_rows.problem: Prevent noisy files slipping into PRs
priority_rows.acceptance: CI fails if generated paths are staged unexpectedly Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_008_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Hardware-aware local model planner
priority_rows.problem: Keep local routing aligned with actual machine capacity
priority_rows.acceptance: Router can detect CPU/RAM/VRAM class, recommend/update eligible local models, and log changes before activation Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_009_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Optional reflex sub-layer under habits (fast micro-routines)
priority_rows.problem: Improve adaptation latency for frequent tiny tasks without promoting permanent system changes
priority_rows.acceptance: Add `habits/reflexes/` runtime path and tiny-model executor; reflex generation/degradation mirrors habit promotion/decay rules; router can prefer reflex before habit when confidence and latency budget are met Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_015_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Ignore memory snapshots after backup channels are verified
priority_rows.problem: Keep repo clean once adaptive/normal memory have reliable off-repo backup/restore
priority_rows.acceptance: Define backup integrity checks for memory snapshots, then add scoped `.gitignore` rules for backup-only memory artifacts without ignoring source/config/governance files

priority_rows.title: Outcome-linked routing learning by task type
priority_rows.problem: Improve model selection quality beyond availability/latency signals
priority_rows.acceptance: Router maintains `task_type x model` success matrix and uses it in ranking/escalation decisions with measurable uplift Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/bl_025_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Prompt/result cache with TTL + invalidation policy
priority_rows.problem: Reduce repeated LLM spend on near-identical requests while preserving correctness
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/routing/llm_gateway.js` now stores prompt/result cache entries with TTL + LRU pruning in `state/routing/prompt_result_cache`, supports source fingerprint + bust key invalidation hooks, and emits cache-hit/miss telemetry in gateway audit logs

priority_rows.title: Proposal semantic dedupe (near-duplicate clustering)
priority_rows.acceptance: Autonomy candidate intake now applies semantic near-duplicate suppression using token-stem Jaccard similarity with same-context guards (type + source/objective) before ranking (`systems/autonomy/autonomy_controller.ts`), and regression coverage validates strict vs relaxed context behavior (`memory/tools/tests/autonomy_semantic_dedupe.test.js`).

priority_rows.title: Schema drift without migration discipline
priority_rows.problem: Replay/federation break when events/profiles evolve ad hoc
priority_rows.acceptance: Enforce N-2 schema contract + migration plans for any schema change; linked: `V3-049`

priority_rows.title: Determinism gaps in replay
priority_rows.problem: Debugging and cross-hardware parity become unreliable
priority_rows.acceptance: Deterministic mode + replay parity as release blocker on core lanes; linked: `V2-FND-002`, `V2-FND-005`, `V3-044`

priority_rows.title: Key and secret lifecycle fragility
priority_rows.problem: Strong runtime guards fail if rotation/recovery paths are weak
priority_rows.acceptance: Rotate/revoke/recover drills with audited ceremonies and failover tests; linked: `V3-051`

priority_rows.title: Multi-node partition and split-brain semantics
priority_rows.problem: Scale-out behavior can diverge and corrupt global state
priority_rows.acceptance: Deterministic quorum + partition simulation tests + failover receipts; linked: `V3-046`, `V2-FND-005`

priority_rows.title: Data retention/churn bloat
priority_rows.problem: Storage and signal quality degrade over time
priority_rows.acceptance: Retention tiers, compaction policy, and "why-kept" tags on long-lived artifacts; linked: `V2-FND-002`, `V3-053`

priority_rows.title: External world-model staleness
priority_rows.problem: Tool/profile drift causes silent execution and compliance regressions
priority_rows.acceptance: Add scheduled world-model freshness loop with staleness SLO gates; linked: `V3-060`, `V2-067`, `V3-039`

priority_rows.title: Compliance/reporting automation (optional enterprise track)
priority_rows.problem: Enterprise deployment often requires auditable policy/report workflows
priority_rows.acceptance: Governance evidence index + SOC2 readiness report automation is implemented in `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` and `config/compliance_controls_map.json`

priority_rows.title: Maintainer handoff pack + bus-factor guardrails
priority_rows.problem: Reduce single-operator risk and improve team legibility at handoff
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/handoff_pack.ts` now builds deterministic handoff packs (docs + architecture map + ownership matrix) and runs SLA-bounded simulation receipts over critical operator commands

priority_rows.title: Comprehensive documentation system (docs-as-code + coverage gates)
priority_rows.problem: Make system legible and maintainable by external teams without tribal knowledge
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/docs_coverage_gate.ts` now enforces critical-path docs mapping + broken local link checks, with policy in `config/docs_coverage_map.json`, merge guard integration, and required-checks workflow jobs

priority_rows.title: Full adaptive mutation safety kernel expansion
priority_rows.problem: Expand the V1 baseline guardrails into full topology/genome evolution containment
priority_rows.acceptance: Branch risk scoring + mutation-rate caps + staged promotion bands + high-risk approval controls landed in `systems/autonomy/mutation_safety_kernel.ts` and are enforced by `systems/autonomy/proposal_enricher.ts`

priority_rows.title: Observer/Mirror read-only narration layer
priority_rows.problem: Add externalized introspection so operators get deterministic situational summaries instead of raw log spelunking
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/observer_mirror.ts` emits daily mood/statement/recommendation snapshots under `state/autonomy/observer_mirror/` and spine runs it as `spine_observer_mirror`

priority_rows.title: Orchestron emergence hardening pass (candidate risk + trit gates + lineage metadata + richer birth telemetry)
priority_rows.problem: Tighten adaptive workflow safety and observability while preserving generation diversity
priority_rows.acceptance: Emergence lane now publishes explicit verification bundles (depth caps, adversarial critical-gate propagation, trit/composite floors, promotable cap) plus rollback guidance to return to guarded shadow mode, in addition to existing lineage + birth telemetry fields. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v2_040_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Orchestron creative-primary + trit-depth recursion pass
priority_rows.problem: Push novelty generation and trit-guided adaptation into first-class candidate selection
priority_rows.acceptance: Creative-primary + recursive generation remains enabled (`primary_source`/`reserved_slots`, trit uncertainty weighting, depth expansion) and is now covered by surfaced verification/rollback signals in adaptive controller and workflow-controller orchestration outputs. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v2_043_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Deterministic autotest doctor v0 (separate repair plane + auto kill-switch)
priority_rows.problem: Enable safe autonomous repair for autotest-detected breakage without LLM control or prompt-gaming surface
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/autotest_doctor.ts` + policy/config + scripts and continuum task hook. Doctor reads structured autotest artifacts only, executes static allowlisted recipes, supports shadow-by-default operation, auto-trips kill-switch on suspicious/abnormal patterns, and emits health telemetry.

priority_rows.title: Independent repair-plane watchdog (out-of-band verifier)
priority_rows.problem: Reduce single-controller compromise risk and detect doctor tampering/gaming attempts early
priority_rows.acceptance: Added independent watcher `systems/ops/autotest_doctor_watchdog.ts` with history/state/attestation checks and block-file quarantine lane wired into doctor apply-mode; coverage in `memory/tools/tests/autotest_doctor_watchdog.test.js`

priority_rows.title: Candidacy Threshold Calibration for Low-Spread High-Volume Lanes
priority_rows.problem: Current `min_workflow_spread`/`min_days_observed` thresholds can stall high-volume adapter candidates indefinitely even when usage/pain evidence is strong, reducing practical assimilation throughput.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add policy-governed threshold calibration path in `systems/assimilation/candidacy_ledger.ts` + `config/assimilation_policy.json` (bounded overrides by source/risk/evidence quality), emit explicit blocker telemetry in assess/status output, and cover calibration/non-abuse behavior in assimilation controller + ledger tests.

priority_rows.title: Candidate Ranking Metric Contract Fix (`pain_cost_score`)
priority_rows.problem: Assimilation controller currently reads `thresholds.metrics.pain_cost_score` even though candidacy ledger does not emit that metric, causing baseline rank/impact/weight distortion.
priority_rows.acceptance: Unify candidacy metric schema between `systems/assimilation/candidacy_ledger.ts` and `systems/assimilation/assimilation_controller.ts` (either emit `pain_cost_score` or switch all reads to existing metrics), and add regression assertions that ranking/impact/attribution weights are non-zero and deterministic for ready candidates.

priority_rows.title: Per-Run Assimilation Snapshot Retention (No Same-Day Overwrite)
priority_rows.problem: `runs/YYYY-MM-DD.json` currently overwrites prior same-day runs, reducing auditability and regression replay fidelity for high-frequency calibration cycles.
priority_rows.acceptance: Persist run artifacts by run id (`runs/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>.json` or equivalent append-only manifest), keep latest pointer semantics, and extend `status`/history queries plus tests to prove multiple same-day runs remain independently retrievable. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_assim_023_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Legacy dependency anchor (V3-BENCH-001)
priority_rows.problem: This prerequisite ID is referenced by active backlog rows but was not present in canonical registry rows after parsing.
priority_rows.acceptance: Canonical anchor added so dependency checks can verify this prerequisite as satisfied; no new execution lane is required and rollback remains the original upstream lane fallback.

priority_rows.title: Legacy dependency anchor (V3-DOC-001)
priority_rows.problem: This prerequisite ID is referenced by active backlog rows but was not present in canonical registry rows after parsing.
priority_rows.acceptance: Canonical anchor added so dependency checks can verify this prerequisite as satisfied; no new execution lane is required and rollback remains the original upstream lane fallback. Evidence: `systems/ops/docs_structure_pack.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Legion Honor Codex (Soul-Bound Medals, Titles, and Red Legion Rank System)
priority_rows.problem: Contribution and defense performance produce durable value that should be recognized with portable, verifiable identity artifacts to strengthen operator/community incentives.
priority_rows.acceptance: Deliver `systems/honor/` codex lane (mint/verify/display), soul-bound badge ledger, chain medal bridge, title-selection command surface, red-legion manifest thresholds, and staged `redteam` -> `red_legion` migration with full docs/tests and backward-compatible aliases.

priority_rows.title: Open Contribution Governance Pipeline (CLA + Community Vote + Upstream Automation)
priority_rows.problem: Community-driven stewardship requires auditable contribution governance and bounded promotion controls for non-proprietary lanes.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add CLA enforcement, community-vote gate, and upstream automation contracts for eligible lanes, require verification receipts linking votes/approvals to promotions, and include rollback-safe hold/revert controls when governance checks fail. Verify via npm run -s lane:v3-race-295:run and npm run -s test:lane:v3-race-295; receipt must be present in state artifacts. Rollback via git revert of completion commit or canonical status reset to queued if regression is detected. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_queue_executor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Open-Ended Defensive Tool Discovery + Evolution Lane
priority_rows.problem: Predefined defenses age quickly; Red Team should generate novel defensive tools across evolving categories (detection, friction, decoy, verification, containment orchestration, temporal deception, adaptive honeypots, stack-aware pressure profiles) for new threat classes (advanced RE, distillation, hardware probing, supply-chain abuse, etc.)
priority_rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/redteam/adaptive_defense_expansion.ts` with open-category tool proposal synthesis (`proposeToolsFromIncidents`), category expansion, bounded/legal/reversible metadata, and shadow-first promotion receipts; wired into harness run/status.

priority_rows.title: Adaptive Cost-Escalation Profiles + Runtime Fingerprint Classes
priority_rows.problem: Fixed friction profiles are easier to optimize around; adaptive profiles should tune defense pressure by unauthorized runtime class
priority_rows.acceptance: Update cost profiles now derives stack-adaptive challenge/friction/decoy/rate-limit profiles by runtime fingerprint class from containment telemetry and stores them in cost profiles json. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_001_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Evolutionary Cost Model Trainer (Stack-Adaptive + Category Expansion)
priority_rows.problem: Cost-escalation quality should improve continuously from incidents and self-play, including when existing defense categories plateau
priority_rows.acceptance: Adaptive runner now recalibrates cost model each cycle, reports uplift vs target, and proposes category expansion when telemetry indicates pressure concentration. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_004_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Exemption Registry + Expiry/Audit Enforcement
priority_rows.problem: Exemption power must be fully auditable to prevent creep or abuse
priority_rows.acceptance: Added registry + audit enforcement (exemptions json, exemption audit jsonl, audit exemptions) with strict mode signaling on expired/out-of-scope exemptions; contract/foundation checks now include this lane. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_hall_002_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Adaptive Exemption Calibration Loop
priority_rows.problem: Exemptions should scale with verified threat severity and shrink when no longer needed
priority_rows.acceptance: Exemption state now decays via audit cycle (expired auto-pruned) and calibration is tied to incident-driven adaptive run outputs (uplift + threat pressure telemetry). Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_hall_003_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Stack-Specific Resource Poisoning
priority_rows.problem: Red Team detects attacker tech stack (GPU type, cloud provider, RE tooling) and crafts challenges that burn more on their specific hardware/software
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented stack-adaptive profile outputs (fingerprint-specific challenge/friction/decoy/rate limits) with bounded factors and no offensive behavior. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_nasty_002_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Psychological Decay Tease
priority_rows.problem: Unauthorized copies get intermittent "glitches" that look like bugs but are designed to waste debugging time (e.g., random latency spikes, fake errors)
priority_rows.acceptance: Added bounded psychological decay profile (`fake_glitch_probability`, capped extra latency) generated by adaptive defense runner with defensive-only constraints. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_nasty_003_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Self-Replicating Containment Children
priority_rows.problem: If unauthorized copy tries to fork or spread, the venom spawns degraded "children" that amplify the cost (e.g., more decoys, more friction)
priority_rows.acceptance: Added bounded containment-children strategy metadata (`max_children_per_incident`) in adaptive/nasty profiles to support recursive but finite local containment expansion. Evidence: `systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_nasty_004_anchor.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Org-Level README + Onboarding Narrative Refresh
priority_rows.problem: Top-level onboarding narrative does not yet consistently present architecture, ownership, and operating model at enterprise-team quality.
priority_rows.acceptance: Publish a polished org README package (system map, quickstart, governance links, contribution workflow, release/process references) with consistency checks against CLI/docs contracts and maintainable update workflow. Verify via docs lint/link/snapshot checks and onboarding dry-run receipt; rollback by restoring prior README and keeping new docs in a staged branch.

priority_rows.title: Release Provenance Pipeline (Signed Tags + Changelog Evidence)
priority_rows.problem: Release process can appear ad hoc without deterministic tag/changelog generation tied to actual commit history and verification artifacts.
priority_rows.acceptance: Build release pipeline that creates signed semantic tags from current HEAD, generates changelog entries from real commit ranges, and emits provenance receipts (tag hash, signer, commit span, timestamp). Verify via release dry-run contracts and reproducibility checks; rollback by using manual release workflow with mandatory verification checklist.

priority_rows.title: Conduit certification: parity + latency budgets
priority_rows.problem: Need proof that hosted/embedded operation is equivalent and within budget
priority_rows.acceptance: Certification tests assert direct vs stdio parity and budget targets (`<5ms` hosted average, `<20ms` embedded/stdin).

priority_rows.title: Conduit rebuild contract in backlog registry
priority_rows.problem: Regression recovery requires deterministic, phase-scoped rebuild ordering
priority_rows.acceptance: Backlog contains complete conduit phase chain with dependency ordering and acceptance contracts so implementation can be replayed after regression without scope drift.

priority_rows.title: ADR Enforcement Gate (Architecture Decision Traceability)
priority_rows.problem: ADRs exist but are not consistently enforced for architecture-impacting changes, which weakens long-term operability and auditability.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add CI gate that requires ADR linkage for architecture-impacting changes, enforces ADR template completeness (`context/decision/consequences/rollback`), tracks status transitions (`proposed/accepted/superseded`), and fails promotion on stale or missing decisions; emit deterministic traceability receipts per merge wave.

priority_rows.title: Memory continuity index rebuild run
priority_rows.problem: Continuity quality regressed when memory indices drifted behind recent node writes.
priority_rows.acceptance: memory/tools/rebuild_exclusive.js completes and regenerates memory index artifacts with archive-safe filtering.

priority_rows.title: Observability metrics hardening (p99 + escalation + cost attribution)
priority_rows.problem: Operational dashboard coverage was missing explicit p99 latency, human-escalation pressure, and token-burn cost attribution signals.
priority_rows.acceptance: `crates/ops/src/health_status.rs` now emits `receipt_latency_p99_ms`, `human_escalation_open_rate`, and `token_burn_cost_attribution` plus metric-alert wiring in `protheus-ops status --dashboard`.

priority_rows.title: Deterministic router offline fallback plan output
priority_rows.problem: Model fallback behavior was implicit and not surfaced as a deterministic contract in router receipts.
priority_rows.acceptance: `crates/ops/src/model_router.rs` now emits `route_plan` (`provider_online`, `preferred_model`, `fallback_model`, `selected_model`, `fallback_applied`) in model-router receipts.

priority_rows.title: Dream consolidation gate (bounded sleep cycle)
priority_rows.problem: Compress experience into actionable pattern memory without live-loop instability
priority_rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/fractal/organism_cycle.ts` as bounded `dream_consolidation` output (proposal-only, no direct actuation) executed by spine (`spine_fractal_organism_cycle`)

priority_rows.title: Resonance field actuation gates
priority_rows.problem: Move from telemetry-only harmony to bounded execution influence once reliability is proven under load
priority_rows.acceptance: Resonance evaluate/status outputs now include explicit verification checks (consensus/confidence/allowlist/fallback) plus deterministic rollback contracts for immediate neutralization, with updated coverage in `memory/tools/tests/resonance_field_gates.test.js`. Evidence: `systems/fractal/resonance_field_gates.js`.

priority_rows.title: Analysis Kernel Stage Interface & Plugin Contracts
priority_rows.problem: Analysis pipeline fragmentation slows safe evolution and increases integration overhead.
priority_rows.acceptance: Analysis kernel stage API is live with pluggable contracts and regression harness proving equivalent outputs on baseline detector set.

priority_rows.title: Optional pip installation wrapper (thin Python CLI)
priority_rows.problem: Python ecosystem onboarding was missing, but any addition must keep Rust as the only kernel authority.
priority_rows.acceptance: packages/protheus-py provides a thin protheus/protheus-py CLI wrapper that delegates to protheus-ops without reimplementing kernel logic.

priority_rows.title: Forge Organ (rapid temporary capability assembly)
priority_rows.problem: Allow fast capability growth by composing proven primitives while keeping permanence gated
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/forge/forge_organ.ts` assembles temporary vassal organs from archetypes/micro-LLM/skill bridges, enforces TTL + containment, maps capability packs to available hardware classes, and only grafts permanent capability after nursery evidence thresholds are met. Spec reference: `tmp/grok_fractal_organs_2026-02-25.md`

priority_rows.title: Legacy dependency anchor (V3-ENT-001)
priority_rows.problem: This prerequisite ID is referenced by active backlog rows but was not present in canonical registry rows after parsing.
priority_rows.acceptance: Canonical anchor added so dependency checks can verify this prerequisite as satisfied; no new execution lane is required and rollback remains the original upstream lane fallback. Evidence: `systems/ops/enterprise_readiness_pack.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Legacy dependency anchor (V3-SYM-001)
priority_rows.problem: This prerequisite ID is referenced by active backlog rows but was not present in canonical registry rows after parsing.
priority_rows.acceptance: Canonical anchor added so dependency checks can verify this prerequisite as satisfied; no new execution lane is required and rollback remains the original upstream lane fallback. Evidence: `systems/symbiosis/deep_symbiosis_understanding_layer.ts`.

priority_rows.title: Universal Importers (OpenFang/CrewAI/AutoGen/LangGraph/Common Dumps)
priority_rows.problem: Users coming from other agent stacks face high switching cost without structured import tooling.
priority_rows.acceptance: Add `systems/migration/importers/` pluggable import surface with first-class OpenFang importer plus generic JSON/YAML/workflow graph adapters, CLI `protheusctl import --from=<engine> --path=<source>`, mapped-state summary reports, and contract tests for no-loss transforms.

priority_rows.title: Long-horizon value drift in Heroic Echo
priority_rows.problem: Alignment can narrow subtly over years without explicit renewal and review
priority_rows.acceptance: Add periodic value-anchor renewal with reversible updates and user review gates; linked: `V3-057`

priority_rows.title: Multi-team/multi-environment release governance
priority_rows.problem: Support organization-scale ownership without destabilizing autonomy
priority_rows.acceptance: Dev/stage/prod promotion governance with owner boundaries + dual-approval protections is enforced by `systems/ops/environment_promotion_gate.ts`

priority_rows.title: Nursery promotion hardening (lineage + cooldown + evidence floor)
priority_rows.problem: Prevent fragile or untraceable specialist checkpoint promotion
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` now enforces eval/data minimums, optional drift/regression caps, checkpoint lineage, cooldown windows, and promotion manifests in `state/nursery/training/promotions/`

priority_rows.title: Cron delivery announce/main hardening
priority_rows.problem: Silent cron failures in isolated jobs created invisible operational drift.
priority_rows.acceptance: All enabled jobs in config/cron_jobs.json use delivery.mode=announce and delivery.channel=main.

priority_rows.title: Skill quarantine enforcement in all install paths
priority_rows.problem: Prevent unreviewed skill install bypasses
priority_rows.acceptance: Strict enforcer scans `systems/`, `habits/`, `skills/`, and `memory/tools/` (tests excluded), blocks direct installer patterns (shell + spawn/exec forms), and requires wrapper + quarantine structure to pass

priority_rows.title: Queue SQLite migration rollout/spec runbook
priority_rows.problem: Concurrent queue cutover needs explicit rollback/playbook evidence for operators before full production lock-in
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/queue_sqlite_migration.md` defines staged cutover, rollback, validation checkpoints, and concurrency/retention notes; linked to BL-046 implementation. Verified in March 2026 migration proof run.

priority_rows.title: npm distribution wrapper for `npm install -g protheus`
priority_rows.problem: Current root package is private/internal; adoption needs a dedicated npm package that installs a `protheus` CLI with Rust binary provisioning.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added publishable `npm/` package with global `protheus` bin entry (`npm/bin/protheus.js`), installer provisioning (`npm/scripts/install.js`: release download + local Cargo build fallback), smoke coverage (`npm/scripts/smoke.js`), package docs (`npm/README.md`), and root README install guidance. Install smoke verified via `cd npm && npm install -g . --prefix ./.global-test` and `./.global-test/bin/protheus --help`.

priority_rows.title: Task-type outcome learning upgrade
priority_rows.problem: Improve model/tool routing quality using empirical task success patterns
priority_rows.acceptance: Routing/ranking consume task-type capability outcomes with tested fallback adjustments in `systems/routing/model_router.ts` + `memory/tools/tests/model_router_routing_features.test.js`

priority_rows.title: Ternary belief reasoning engine for spine state modeling
priority_rows.problem: Representation efficiency: balanced ternary {-1, 0, +1} maps directly to {pain, unknown, ok} states with cleaner consensus/propagation logic than binary
priority_rows.acceptance: `lib/trit.ts` + `lib/ternary_belief_engine.ts` are integrated into spine state modeling (`systems/spine/spine.ts`) with dedicated tests and daily telemetry

priority_rows.title: Genome topology ledger + mutation journal
priority_rows.problem: Give the organism a compact, versioned blueprint that can evolve safely over time
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/genome_ledger.ts` writes schema-versioned snapshots + hash-linked mutation journal rows with verify command, and spine appends daily genome snapshots (`spine_fractal_genome_snapshot`)

priority_rows.title: Full recursive organism introspection map
priority_rows.problem: Close the self-awareness gap by letting the system inspect branch-level function, pressure, and decay internally
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/introspection_map.ts` now emits branch health graph + anomaly-driven restructuring candidates with reversible references; spine runs it daily (`spine_fractal_introspection`)

priority_rows.title: Broken-piece lab pipeline (rollback bundles -> dormant study queue -> safe reimplementation proposals)
priority_rows.problem: Convert rolled-back failures into structured learning artifacts without unsafe auto-patching
priority_rows.acceptance: Doctor now enqueues rollback bundles into deterministic lab queue (`state/ops/autotest_doctor/broken_lab_queue.jsonl`), and `systems/ops/broken_piece_lab.ts` clusters signatures + exports deterministic JSON/Markdown reimplementation proposals; coverage in `memory/tools/tests/broken_piece_lab.test.js`

priority_rows.title: Assimilation Intake Metadata Enrichment Bridge
priority_rows.problem: Assimilation candidacy from workflow execution currently records sparse usage-only signals, leaving legal/research/profile gates underinformed for real external adapters/tools.
priority_rows.acceptance: Extend `systems/workflow/workflow_executor.ts` assimilation usage signal extraction and ledger writes to include normalized legal/surface metadata (license, source URL/domain, tos/robots/data-rights checks, docs/API/auth/rate-limit hints), and verify the enriched fields flow into `systems/assimilation/legal_gate.ts` + `systems/assimilation/research_probe.ts` with deterministic integration coverage.

priority_rows.title: Community Repo Graduation Pack (Banner + Redirect + Pinned Issue)
priority_rows.problem: Users on the legacy/community repo need a clear upgrade path to the official home without ambiguity.
priority_rows.acceptance: Ship automation/docs for README migration banner, pinned issue text, and repo-description redirect artifacts; verify old→new path is one-click discoverable and references evidence-backed migration guidance.

priority_rows.title: Incident postmortem learning loop (blameless + enforceable actions)
priority_rows.problem: Turn failures into compounding operational maturity
priority_rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/postmortem_loop.ts` now auto-creates incident templates, tracks corrective/preventive actions with owners/dates, and blocks closure until preventive checks are linked, verified passing, and resolved

priority_rows.title: Enterprise Onboarding Pack (Operator/Engineer/Contributor Paths)
priority_rows.problem: Onboarding is functional but lacks role-based day-0/day-7/day-30 runbooks expected from larger organizations.
priority_rows.acceptance: Ship role-based onboarding guides with explicit prerequisites, first tasks, safety gates, and success criteria; include local bootstrap, CI, and escalation paths; verify with docs link and checklist completeness checks.

priority_rows.title: Operator Surface Consistency Program (UX/Tone/State Model)
priority_rows.problem: UX and operator surfaces are strong but not yet governed by one consistent state/tone/interaction contract across all commands/panels.
priority_rows.acceptance: Define and enforce surface consistency contract (command shape, status vocabulary, tone profile, state labels, error taxonomy) with snapshot tests across `protheus`, `protheusctl`, `protheus-top`, and reasoning surfaces; require rollback-safe compatibility snapshots for each surface update wave.

priority_rows.title: Trigger Playbook + Operator Docs Wiring
priority_rows.problem: Trigger workflows lacked a canonical documented source, reducing repeatability and operator onboarding clarity.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added `personas/organization/triggers.md` and linked trigger/dashboard operations in `personas/README.md` plus CLI usage surfaces (`systems/ops/protheusctl.ts`, `systems/personas/cli.ts`). Verified through `personas_lens_cli` command-path tests and help-surface coverage in existing CLI suite. Rollback by removing docs references and restoring previous CLI usage text.

priority_rows.title: Operational complexity debt
priority_rows.problem: Organ/lane growth raises MTTR and hides failure modes
priority_rows.acceptance: Enforce complexity budget and net-simplification gate for new organs; linked: `V3-052`, `V2-FND-004`

priority_rows.title: Human override ergonomics under incident stress
priority_rows.problem: Safety controls fail in practice if operators cannot act quickly
priority_rows.acceptance: Timed operator drills with runbook SLA gates and usability fixes; linked: `V2-057`, `V2-FND-005`

priority_rows.title: Catastrophic recovery gap
priority_rows.problem: Total-loss scenarios can break continuity despite local self-healing
priority_rows.acceptance: Implement deterministic resurrection protocol with tested recovery ceremonies; linked: `V3-056`

priority_rows.title: Explainability debt at scale
priority_rows.problem: Future operators/successors may not reconstruct why critical actions occurred
priority_rows.acceptance: Require canonical explanation artifacts for major decisions and self-modifications; linked: `V3-058`, `V2-063`

priority_rows.title: Scale/performance benchmarking harness
priority_rows.problem: Quantify headroom and bottlenecks before broader deployment
priority_rows.acceptance: Reproducible throughput/latency/error/token-efficiency harness is live in `systems/ops/scale_benchmark.ts` with strict thresholds and historical reports

priority_rows.title: SOC2 Type I readiness pack (control mapping + evidence index)
priority_rows.problem: Close the architecture-to-enterprise gap without full compliance overhead too early
priority_rows.acceptance: SOC2 mapping + readiness generation is wired through `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` with control map `config/compliance_controls_map.json` and evidence index outputs

priority_rows.title: LensMap Internal Narrative + Release Polish
priority_rows.problem: Without cohesive narrative/release polish, LensMap packaging can appear ad hoc and fail to project consistent organization-level maturity signals.
priority_rows.acceptance: Produce polished narrative/release artifacts (internal-history README framing, staged changelog timeline, internal CI/workflow placeholders, issue/PR templates) while preserving factual technical contracts. Verify via docs/lint/link checks and consistency snapshots across repo metadata surfaces. Rollback by switching to neutral external-facing docs profile while retaining functional toolchain code paths.

priority_rows.title: Golden dataset + property-style router regression pack
priority_rows.problem: Regression safety relied on sparse unit tests without a dedicated golden corpus and invariant checks for router behavior.
priority_rows.acceptance: `crates/ops/tests/golden/model_router_cases.json` and `crates/ops/tests/model_router_golden_regression.rs` enforce golden outputs and property-style invariants for role/capability/tier contracts.

priority_rows.title: README governance links + repo hygiene ownership fences
priority_rows.problem: Fortune-100 readiness checklist required governance discoverability and explicit ownership boundaries for non-production root zones.
priority_rows.acceptance: Added governance template links in README, added npm/docker badges, and extended .github/CODEOWNERS coverage for /drafts, /notes, and /experiments.
